title: MDA Intent Layer Triple Manifest
description: Validates the triple.manifest.json file that links a Knowledge Capsule, Intent Specification, and Integration Contract into a validated triple.

triple_id.description: Unique identifier for this triple (shared suffix across capsule, intent, and contract).

bpmn_task_id.description: The BPMN task element ID this triple represents.

bpmn_process_id.description: The BPMN process ID containing the task.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this triple was created.

last_validated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last validation run, or null if never validated.

validation_result.description: Result of the last validation run.

provenance.description: Provenance information linking back to the source BPMN file.

bpmn_file.description: Path or name of the source BPMN file.

bpmn_file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source BPMN file for integrity verification.

pipeline_version.description: Version of the generation pipeline that produced this triple.
